subheadline: From a two-person prototype to a platform trusted by 400+ teams worldwide.

events.title: Founded in a garage
events.description: Two engineers shipped the first prototype and signed five design partners in the first month.

events.title: Series A and 50 customers
events.description: Raised $8M to grow the team and launched our self-serve plan to a public waitlist.

events.title: Global data centers
events.description: Opened regions in the EU and Asia, cutting median response times by 40% for international users.

events.title: 400+ teams onboard
events.description: Crossed eight figures in annual recurring revenue and shipped our enterprise security suite.
